species.citation: R.Br. , Prodr. Fl. Nov. Holland. (1810) 167. ssp. asiatica R.M.K.Saunders & K.Fowler, J. Linn. Soc., Bot. 109 (1992) 349. Distribution: ?Afghanistan, Bangladesh, Bhutan, Borneo, China, India, Japan, Java, Korea, Lesser Sunda Isls, Malay Peninsula, Moluccas, Myanmar, Nepal, New Guinea, Pakistan, Philippines, Ryukyu Isls, Sri Lanka, Sulawesi, Sumatra, Taiwan, Thailand, Vietnam. LUZON: Kalinga. Notes: Possibly present:. Native.
species.distribution: ?Afghanistan, Bangladesh, Bhutan, Borneo, China, India, Japan, Java, Korea, Lesser Sunda Isls, Malay Peninsula, Moluccas, Myanmar, Nepal, New Guinea, Pakistan, Philippines, Ryukyu Isls, Sri Lanka, Sulawesi, Sumatra, Taiwan, Thailand, Vietnam. BOHOL, LEYTE, LUZON: Abra, Benguet, Cagayan, Ifugao, Kalinga, Laguna, Mountain Province, MINDANAO: Lanao del Sur.

species.notes: Reported for the Philippines by Moody (1989) as a weed in rice, but no specimens cited. Possibly naturalized if indeed present.
